name: @gemma-code/gemma
author: Gemma Labs <support@gemma-code.dev>
description: Use Gemma, a premium terminal coding assistant, right from your terminal. Gemma can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

scripts.prepare: node -e "if (!process.env.AUTHORIZED) { console.error('ERROR: Direct publishing is not allowed.\nPlease see the release workflow documentation to publish this package.'); process.exit(1); }"
